hooks.name: pre-compact-flush-state
hooks.description: Snapshot current session state to .forge/state.json. Originally a PreCompact hook (pre-v3); v3 has no PreCompact trigger, so it now fires at session end instead of before each compaction. Ponytail: a future PostCompaction trigger would restore mid-session snapshots; until then this is best-effort end-of-session flush only.
